CVE-2023-46445.title: An issue in AsyncSSH before 2.14.1 allows attackers to control th ...
CVE-2023-46445.description: An issue in AsyncSSH before 2.14.1 allows attackers to control the extension info message (RFC 8308) via a man-in-the-middle attack, aka a "Rogue Extension Negotiation."

CVE-2023-46446.title: An issue in AsyncSSH before 2.14.1 allows attackers to control th ...
CVE-2023-46446.description: An issue in AsyncSSH before 2.14.1 allows attackers to control the remote end of an SSH client session via packet injection/removal and shell emulation, aka a "Rogue Session Attack."
